mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food WHERE id = #{id}
AND (is_builtin = 1 OR user_id = #{userId})
AND is_builtin = 1
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId} AND is_builtin = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food
LOWER(name) = LOWER(#{name})
AND (is_builtin = 1 OR user_id = #{userId})
AND is_builtin = 1
LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food
(is_builtin = 1 OR user_id = #{userId})
is_builtin = 1
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE WHEN is_builtin = 0 THEN 0 WHEN category = '主食' THEN 1 WHEN category = '肉蛋奶' THEN 2 WHEN category = '蔬果' THEN 3 WHEN category = '豆制品' THEN 4 WHEN category = '饮品' THEN 5 WHEN category = '零食' THEN 6 WHEN category = '其他' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC

SELECT id, user_id, name, calories_per_100g, protein_per_100g, carbs_per_100g, fat_per_100g, category, source, source_ref, aliases, is_builtin, sort_order, created_at FROM food
user_id = #{userId} AND is_builtin = 0
AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR aliases LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY CASE WHEN category = '主食' THEN 1 WHEN category = '肉蛋奶' THEN 2 WHEN category = '蔬果' THEN 3 WHEN category = '豆制品' THEN 4 WHEN category = '饮品' THEN 5 WHEN category = '零食' THEN 6 WHEN category = '其他' THEN 7 ELSE 99 END ASC, sort_order ASC, name ASC, id ASC
